description: This 2 pack of high power reading glasses 4.0 offers clear vision, comfortable wear, and added eye protection. Designed for presbyopic users, these readers magnify text and objects, making them suitable for reading books, documents, newspapers, or browsing on digital devices. Each pair features blue light blocking lenses to filter rays from compatible with LED screens, computers, tablets, and smartphones. This helps reduce digital eye strain, prevent headaches, and improve sleep quality, making them perfect computer light blocking glasses for daily use. These eyeglasses readers are crafted with a lightweight and long-lasting frame that provides both comfort and style. Suitable as mens reading glasses or ladies reading glasses, they are designed with a unisex vintage look that matches office, home, or casual settings. Scratch resistant lenses ensure long-lasting performance and clear vision, while aided eyeglasses construction enhances comfort and stability. Whether you need readers glasses women or readers glasses men, this set provides reliable magnification and everyday practicality. With the value pack of 2 reading glasses, you can keep one at home and one at the office or in your bag, ensuring you always have access to strong magnification when needed. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable fit even for long periods of reading or screen time. These eyewear readers are a versatile solution for anyone needing strong magnification, blue light protection, and stylish durability. A smart choice for presbyopic users seeking comfort, clarity, and convenience in daily life. Package includes 2 pairs of +4.0 reading glasses.
